name: Spicy Texas Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Ground Red Chiles, To Taste
2 Jalapeno Chiles, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and finely chop the Jalapeno chiles.
2. Combine all ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan.
3. Heat mixture to boiling.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 1 hour.
5. Makes about 5 cups of sauce.
